tools.name: query
tools.title: Convex Query
tools.description:
Execute a Convex Lisp query. Queries are read-only, free, and instant.

Common patterns:
- (balance #13) — coin balance in copper (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper)
- *balance* — caller's own balance
- (account #13) — full account record
- (@convex.fungible/balance #TOKEN #USER) — fungible token balance
- (call #ACTOR (fn-name args)) — call actor function read-only
- (lookup #ADDR 'symbol) — look up a definition
- *state* — full network state (large!)

tools.name: prepare
tools.title: Prepare Transaction
tools.description:
Prepare a Convex transaction for signing. Returns a hash to pass to 'signAndSubmit' or 'submit'.

Common source patterns:
- Transfer: (transfer #DEST AMOUNT)
- Deploy actor: (deploy '(do (defn greet [x] (str "Hello " x)) (export greet)))
- Call actor: (call #ACTOR (function-name arg1 arg2))
- Define value: (def my-var 42)
- Set controller: (set-controller #ADDR)
- Register CNS: (call #9 (cns-update 'my.name *address*))

Amounts in copper (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper).

tools.name: transact
tools.title: Convex Transaction (Quick)
tools.description:
Execute a Convex transaction in one step. Sends seed over network — use HTTPS with trusted peers only. For sensitive operations prefer prepare → signAndSubmit.

Transactions update global state atomically. Amounts in copper (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper).

tools.name: encode
tools.title: Encode CAD3
tools.description: Encode a CVM literal into CAD3 multi-cell hex bytes.

tools.name: decode
tools.title: Decode CAD3
tools.description: Decode CAD3 multi-cell hex bytes back into a CVM literal.

tools.name: submit
tools.title: Submit Prepared Transaction
tools.description: Submit a previously prepared transaction with hash, public key, and signature.

tools.name: signAndSubmit
tools.title: Sign and Submit Transaction
tools.description: Sign and submit a prepared transaction. Use after 'prepare'. Sends seed over network — HTTPS only.

tools.name: hash
tools.title: Hash Calculator
tools.description: Compute a SHA-256 or SHA3 hash of supplied data.

tools.name: sign
tools.title: Value Signer
tools.description: Sign raw hex data with an Ed25519 seed. For transactions, sign the 'hash' from prepare.

tools.name: peerStatus
tools.title: Peer Status
tools.description: Return current Convex peer status including consensus point and network state.

tools.name: keyGen
tools.title: Key Pair Generator
tools.description: Generate a new Ed25519 key pair. Provide a seed for deterministic output, or omit for secure random.

tools.name: validate
tools.title: Signature Validator
tools.description: Validate an Ed25519 signature against a public key and message bytes.

tools.name: createAccount
tools.title: Create Account
tools.description: Create a new Convex account with the specified public key. Optionally fund via faucet (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper, max 1 CVM).

tools.name: describeAccount
tools.title: Describe Account
tools.description: Get account info: balance, sequence number, defined symbols with metadata.

tools.name: lookup
tools.title: Symbol Lookup
tools.description: Look up a symbol in a Convex account environment. Returns existence, value (with optional path navigation), and metadata.

tools.name: resolveCNS
tools.title: Resolve CNS Name
tools.description: Resolve a CNS name to its record: value (usually an address), controller, metadata, and child node.

tools.name: getTransaction
tools.title: Get Transaction
tools.description: Look up a transaction by hash. Returns signed data, consensus position, and execution result.

tools.name: getBalance
tools.title: Get Balance
tools.description: Get coin or token balance for an account. Returns balance in copper (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper).

tools.name: transfer
tools.title: Transfer
tools.description: Transfer CVM coins or fungible tokens to another account. Amounts in copper for CVM (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper).

tools.name: watchState
tools.title: Watch State
tools.description: Watch a path in the global CVM state for changes. Returns a watchId. Changes are delivered as SSE notifications on the session's GET /mcp stream. Requires an active session (Mcp-Session-Id).

tools.name: unwatchState
tools.title: Unwatch State
tools.description: Stop watching state paths. Provide a watchId to remove a single watch, or a path to remove all watches whose path starts with the given prefix. At least one of watchId or path must be provided.

tools.name: signingServiceInfo
tools.title: Signing Service Info
tools.description: Check if the peer's signing service is available. No authentication required.

tools.name: signingCreateKey
tools.title: Create Signing Key
tools.description: Create a new Ed25519 key pair in the signing service. Private key stored encrypted server-side. Authenticated.

tools.name: signingListKeys
tools.title: List Signing Keys
tools.description: List all public keys stored in the signing service for the authenticated identity.

tools.name: signingSign
tools.title: Sign with Stored Key
tools.description: Sign hex-encoded bytes using a stored signing service key. Authenticated.

tools.name: signingGetJWT
tools.title: Get Self-Signed JWT
tools.description: Create a self-signed EdDSA JWT (did:key identity) using a stored signing key. Authenticated.

tools.name: signingTransact
tools.title: Transact via Signing Service
tools.description: Execute a Convex transaction using a stored signing key. Private key never leaves the server. Authenticated.

tools.name: signingCreateAccount
tools.title: Create Account via Signing Service
tools.description: Create a new signing key and on-chain account in one step. Optionally fund via faucet. Authenticated.

tools.name: signingListAccounts
tools.title: List Signing Accounts
tools.description: List signing keys and associated on-chain addresses for the authenticated identity.

tools.name: signingImportKey
tools.title: Import Key (Signing Service)
tools.description: Import an Ed25519 seed into the signing service. Elevated: first call returns confirmUrl for browser approval, retry with confirmToken.

tools.name: signingExportKey
tools.title: Export Key (Signing Service)
tools.description: Export (reveal) the private seed for a stored key. Elevated: first call returns confirmUrl, retry with confirmToken.

tools.name: signingDeleteKey
tools.title: Delete Key (Signing Service)
tools.description: Permanently delete a key from the signing service. Irreversible. Elevated: first call returns confirmUrl, retry with confirmToken.

tools.name: signingChangePassphrase
tools.title: Change Passphrase (Signing Service)
tools.description: Change the passphrase for a stored signing key. Elevated: first call returns confirmUrl, retry with confirmToken.

tools.name: jvm:urlEncode
tools.title: URL Encode
tools.description: URL encodes a string using JVM operations

tools.name: jvm:stringConcat
tools.title: JVM String Concatenation
tools.description: Concatenates two strings using JVM operations

tools.name: jvm:urlDecode
tools.title: URL Decode
tools.description: URL decodes a string using JVM operations

tools.name: test:never
tools.title: Never Operation
tools.description: An operation that never completes, i.e. its status will remain PENDING

tools.name: test:error
tools.title: Fail Operation
tools.description: Always fails, regardless of input

tools.name: test:echo
tools.title: Echo Operation
tools.description: Returns the input unchanged. Useful for testing or as a generalised identity function.

tools.name: orchestrator
tools.title: Test orchestration
tools.description: Runs a sequence of operations

tools.name: test:delay
tools.title: Delay Operation
tools.description: Runs another op after a delay

tools.name: test:random
tools.title: Random Data Generator
tools.description: Generates a specified number of random bytes using a cryptographically secure random number generator

tools.name: langchain:openai
tools.title: GPT-5 nano
tools.description: Chat with OpenAI GPT-5 nano

tools.name: langchain:ollama:qwen3
tools.title: Qwen model chat
tools.description: This is an example operation that gets a response from the Qwen3 LLM via ollama

tools.name: langchain:ollama
tools.title: Ollama model chat
tools.description: Example operation that chats with a local Ollama-served LLM via LangChainAdapter

tools.name: langchain:openai
tools.title: Gemini model chat
tools.description: Example operation that chats with a Gemini endpoint via LangChainAdapter (OpenAI-compatible route)

tools.name: langchain:openai
tools.title: Deepseek chat
tools.description: Example operation that chats with a DeepSeek endpoint via LangChainAdapter (OpenAI-compatible route)

tools.name: langchain:openai
tools.title: OpenAI model chat
tools.description: Example operation that chats with an OpenAI-compatible endpoint via LangChainAdapter

tools.name: grid:run
tools.title: Grid Run
tools.description: Run a Covia grid operation on this venue or an optional remote venue

tools.name: grid:invoke
tools.title: Grid Invoke
tools.description: Submit a Covia grid operation and return the job status

tools.name: grid:jobResult
tools.title: Grid Job Result
tools.description: Wait for a Covia grid job to finish and return its output

tools.name: grid:jobStatus
tools.title: Grid Job Status
tools.description: Fetch the current status of a Covia grid job by ID

tools.name: convex:transact
tools.title: Convex Transact
tools.description: Execute a transaction against a Convex peer

tools.name: convex:query
tools.title: Convex Query
tools.description: Execute a read-only query against a Convex peer

tools.name: http
tools.title: HTTP GET Operation
tools.description: Performs a simple HTTP GET request using the HTTPAdapter

tools.name: http
tools.title: HTTP Query Parameters Example
tools.description: Demonstrates how to use query parameters with the HTTP adapter for API calls

tools.name: orchestrator
tools.title: Practical Google Search Orchestration
tools.description: Performs a Google search using the HTTPAdapter - demonstrates proper URL construction

tools.name: orchestrator
tools.title: Google Search Orchestration
tools.description: Performs a Google search by constructing the URL using stringConcat and urlEncode operations

tools.name: http
tools.title: HTTP POST Operation
tools.description: Performs an HTTP POST request using the HTTPAdapter

tools.name: orchestrator
tools.title: Google Search Orchestration
tools.description: Performs a Google search using the HTTPAdapter and returns the search results

tools.name: orchestrator
tools.title: Advanced Google Search Orchestration
tools.description: Performs a Google search using the HTTPAdapter with dynamic query parameters

tools.name: mcp:tools:call
tools.title: MCP Tool Call
tools.description: Runs a remote MCP tool via HTTP(s)

tools.name: mcp:tools:list
tools.title: MCP Tools List
tools.description: Lists available MCP tools from a remote server
